summary: Comprehensive testing of Seva Setu Bot completed. All backend APIs (100% - 13/13 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Chat with AI (GPT-5.2), progress stepper, voice toggle, camera dialog, file upload, and Super Admin login all verified functional.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API Health Check - /api/ returns running status
✅ Chat API - /api/consular/chat accepts POST and returns AI response
✅ Chat returns valid session_id (UUID format)
✅ Chat response contains meaningful content (>50 chars)
✅ Chat step field is valid (register/upload/verify/sign)
✅ Chat accepts language parameter (hi, en, etc.)
✅ Super Admin login with valid credentials (superadmin@sarthak.ai / Admin@2025)
✅ Super Admin login rejects invalid password (401)
✅ Super Admin login rejects invalid email (401)
✅ Session retrieval - non-existent session returns 404
✅ Session creation and retrieval via chat
✅ Form submission endpoint works
✅ Voice input endpoint accessible
✅ Landing page loads with 'Start Consular Application' button
✅ Landing page has Super Admin and Local Admin buttons
✅ Landing page shows 3 feature cards (Multi-Tenant, Secure, Multilingual)
✅ ConsularBot page loads with avatar and progress stepper
✅ Progress stepper shows all 4 steps (Register→Upload→Verify→Sign)
✅ Chat interface with welcome message 'Namaste! I'm Seva Setu Bot...'
✅ Chat input accepts text and sends messages
✅ Typing indicator appears during AI response
✅ Voice toggle switch works (enabled/disabled)
✅ Mic button visible for voice input
✅ Camera button opens camera dialog with Capture/Cancel buttons
✅ File upload button triggers file picker
✅ Super Admin login flow works - redirects to dashboard
✅ Super Admin dashboard shows analytics (Companies, Sessions, Documents)
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in LocalAdminDashboard.jsx and SuperAdminDashboard.jsx - missing 'navigate' dependency in useEffect
Backend logs show 'VFS Global Scraping Failed' and 'Website Content Change Detected' - fallback mechanism working but live scraping has SSL issues
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working. Backend pytest file created at /app/backend/tests/test_seva_setu_api.py. Chat API uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM integration. Voice synthesis and document OCR available. Real-time scraping has SSL certificate issues with some official sources but fallback mechanism works.
